creator: bsd@kobe1995.jp
text:
BTX loader panics on Opteron3280.
	The default CPU, AMD Sempron on Fujitsu Primergy MX130S2 Server Machine
	can boot up FreeBSD, it's no problem.
	But replace Sempron to Opteron3280, BTX loader panics not only HDD
	but also CD-ROM. I tried FreeBSD7.4, 8.3, 9.0 x amd64, i386,
	but all of them panic.

	NetBSD5.1 and OpenBSD5.1 is OK. They are boot up, no problem.

Fix: 

Sorry, yet.
-- 
NAKAMURA Kazushi@KOBE	@http://kobe1995.jp/~kaz/@
BSD Associate certificated
- Break the hate chain. No more kill!
administrator@[127.1]
How-To-Repeat:         Power on the server machine, boot from HDD or CD-ROM.
	There is dmesg of Sempron Primergy MX130S2.
	http://kobe1995.jp/~kaz/dmesg/Fujitsu/MX130S2/
	NetBSD and OpenBSD on Opteron3280's dmesg is
	http://kobe1995.jp/~kaz/dmesg/Fujitsu/MX130S2_Opteron3280/
